title: TytoCare - Remote Examination Devices for Telehealth
problem: Video telehealth is limited — doctors cannot physically examine patients, leading to incomplete diagnoses and unnecessary referrals.
solution: Connected examination devices (stethoscope, otoscope, thermometer) that allow remote physical exams during video consultations.
technology: IoT medical devices, video platform, AI analysis
traction_signals: Deployed by NHS and European health systems
regulatory_notes: CE marked medical devices. FDA cleared in US.
varden_fit: Moderate — device-focused, but remote examination capability could enhance Varden telehealth offerings through clinic partners.
notes: Hardware + software solution. Strong EU presence.
